## Legend

- **🟦 new** — cards captured, no reviews yet.
- **🟡 learning** — at least one card not yet successfully recalled.
- **🟢 settling** — every card has been correctly recalled at least once; intervals still expanding.
- **✅ settled** — every card has reps ≥ 2 and ef ≥ 2.5 (long-term retention zone).
